stonetop.summary: Squeaky little clockwork helper-constructs that just want to assist.

system.concept: Squeaky little clockwork helper-constructs that just want to assist.
system.description: They're not really shaped like spiders, but that's what they make you think of. Picture a metal basket, holding gears and springs and a glowing central core, with articulated legs extending out, each ending in a little three-clawed pincer. They squeak as they move, their many joints needing oil. They were made to be little servants, extra sets of hands around a house or forge — and even now, they're just trying to help.
